    // Create a hexi::static_buffer from the input span

    // Skip the body_data (header.body_length bytes)
    buffer_obj.skip(header.body_length);

    // Read the footer (4 bytes)
    buffer_obj.read(&header.footer, 4);

    return header;
}

   BufferData<> read_from_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<1024>& buffer, size_t data_length)

   - Write the header: buffer.write(&header, 4);
   - Write the data: buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());

 Steps for read_from_dynamic_buffer:
   - Read the header: uint32_t header; buffer.read(&header, 4);
   - Read the data: std::vector<uint8_t> data(data_length); buffer.read(data.data(), data_length);

 However, note that the dynamic_buffer's read function may throw an assertion if we try to read more than available. We assume the buffer has enough data.

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void write_to_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    // Write the header value
    buffer.write(&header, sizeof(header));
    
    // Write the data array
    if (!data.empty()) {
        buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
    }
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferData {
    uint32_t header;
    std::vector<uint8_t> data;
};

BufferData<> read_from_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<1024>& buffer, size_t data_length) {
    BufferData<> result;
    
    // Read the header value
    buffer.read(&result.header, sizeof(result.header));
    
    // Read the data array
    result.data.resize(data_length);
    if (data_length > 0) {
        buffer.read(result.data.data(), data_length);
    }
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct CompactPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::vector<std::string> tags;
    std::string data;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_compact_packet(const CompactPacket& packet) {
    // Create a buffer to hold the serialized data
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    
    // Create a binary_stream object for writing
    hexi::binary_stream writer(buffer);
    
    // Serialize packet_id as uint32_t
    writer << packet.packet_id;
    
    // Serialize tags vector using prefixed_varint adaptor
    writer << hexi::prefixed_varint(packet.tags);
    
    // Serialize data string using prefixed_varint adaptor
    writer << hexi::prefixed_varint(packet.data);
    
    return buffer;
}

CompactPacket deserialize_compact_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    CompactPacket packet;
    
    // Create a binary_stream object for reading
    hexi::binary_stream reader(buffer);
    
    // Deserialize packet_id as uint32_t
    reader >> packet.packet_id;
    
    // Deserialize tags vector using prefixed_varint adaptor
    reader >> hexi::prefixed_varint(packet.tags);
    
    // Deserialize data string using prefixed_varint adaptor
    reader >> hexi::prefixed_varint(packet.data);
    
    return packet;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    // Create a buffer to hold the serialized data
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;

    // Create a buffer_adaptor for the buffer
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);

    // Create a binary_stream with the adaptor
    hexi::binary_stream<decltype(adaptor)> stream(adaptor);

    // Write the header
    stream << packet.header;

    // Write the data (with prefix)
    stream << packet.data;

    // Write 16 bytes of padding (0x00)
    stream.fill<16>(0x00);

    // Write the footer
    stream << packet.footer;

    // Return the buffer
    return buffer;
}
```
